items.title: When can you approach the Ombudsman?
items.content: If your complaint is not resolved within 30 days by Prayaan Capital, or you are unsatisfied with the resolution.

items.title: How to file a complaint
items.content: Online at https://cms.rbi.org.in, by email to crpc@rbi.org.in, or by calling 14448 (toll free).

items.title: Salient features
items.content: One nation, one ombudsman; no fees; jurisdiction-neutral; covers all NBFCs accepting deposits and select non-deposit-taking NBFCs.

items.title: Documents to keep ready
items.content: Loan account number, copies of correspondence with Prayaan Capital, and a brief description of your grievance.
